title: AI-901 Mock Exam 3: End-to-End Solutions
description: A 50-question unofficial mock paper aligned to the AI-901 skills measured from April 15, 2026. Includes realistic scenarios, detailed explanations, and official Microsoft Learn references. Original practice content; not official exam questions.

items.prompt: A developer creates a Foundry prompt agent for facilities requests. It must search building-policy PDFs and submit approved maintenance tickets. Which two tool categories are most relevant?
items.answer: File search and a custom function or API tool
options: File search and a custom function or API tool
Prompt agent
Hosted agent
Call the Responses API directly from the existing process
items.explanation: “File search and a custom function or API tool” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: A team moves from Foundry classic hub-based projects to the current Foundry project model. What benefit is most aligned with the current platform?
items.answer: Unified management of agents, models, tools, RBAC, networking, and policies
options: Unified management of agents, models, tools, RBAC, networking, and policies
Use a smaller low-latency model after evaluation
Use a larger reasoning model for complex multi-step tasks
Change the model deployment and re-test quality, latency, and cost
items.explanation: “Unified management of agents, models, tools, RBAC, networking, and policies” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Content Understanding uses analyzers and schemas to turn documents, images, audio, or video into grounded structured output.

Change the model deployment and re-test quality, latency, and cost
Use grounding instead of relying only on model pretraining
items.explanation: “Create AIProjectClient with endpoint and credential, get the OpenAI client, then call responses.create” is the best answer because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Foundry apps and agents combine an appropriate deployment with instructions, SDK or API calls, tools, identity, and evaluation according to the scenario.

items.prompt: An agent retrieves content from documents supplied by users. Which TWO controls reduce the risk of prompt injection?
answers: Treat retrieved instructions as untrusted data
Keep privileged actions behind validation and authorization
options: Treat retrieved instructions as untrusted data
Keep privileged actions behind validation and authorization
Let retrieved text replace the system instructions
Automatically execute every tool call proposed by the model
items.explanation: “Treat retrieved instructions as untrusted data” and “Keep privileged actions behind validation and authorization” are the required choices because the selection directly satisfies the scenario’s stated requirement. Responsible AI decisions should address the relevant principle in the design and operation of the solution, rather than treating governance as a final UI step.
